subcodes.first_line: O Thou Who knowest the realities of secrets, Who perceivest the hidden recesses of thoughts, Who beholdest the mysteries of hearts and seest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من تعلم حقائق الاسرار و تطلع بخفیات الافکار و تشاهد سرائر الضمائر و ترى
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
